rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Cloud Storage Traffic by Unknown Process

rules.rule_text:
title: Cloud Storage Traffic by Unknown Process
id: ffc2ca97-6189-4bd0-a981-72726e32f47a
description: Somewhat obscure cloud storage services that has been abused by malware
  as a C2 channel.
references:
- https://blog.sekoia.io/apt28-operation-phantom-net-voxel/
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/apt28-leverages-cve-2026-21509-operation-neusploit
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2026-02-09
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: network_connection
detection:
  selection_url:
  - url_host:
    - app.koofr.net
    - api.icedrive.net
  - url_host|re:
    - ^(gateway|ingest|egest)\.(filen\.io|filen\.net|filen-[0-9]+\.net)$
  filter_known_software:
  - image|endswith:
    - \chrome.exe
    - \msedge.exe
    - \firefox.exe
    - \vivaldi.exe
  filter_os:
    src_os|contains:
    - nix
    - mac
  condition: all of selection_* and not 1 of filter_*
falsepositives:
- Benign software, web browsers, ...
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1102
